Rule.name: Toolkit-ApprovalEscalation
Rule.Description:
Escalates pending approval work items after configurable timeout periods. Implements a tiered escalation chain: manager -> director -> security team. Optionally auto-approves after a maximum wait period.
Usage: Call from a workflow step that processes pending approvals. Variables in scope: context (SailPointContext), wfcontext (WorkflowContext), workflow (Workflow).
